recommendations.title: A Quiet Place
recommendations.overview: A family is forced to live in silence while hiding from creatures that hunt by sound.

recommendations.title: A Quiet Place Part II
recommendations.overview: Following the events at home, the Abbott family now face the terrors of the outside world. Forced to venture into the unknown, they realize that the creatures that hunt by sound are not the only threats that lurk beyond the sand path.

recommendations.title: Becoming
recommendations.overview: Join former first lady Michelle Obama in an intimate documentary looking at her life, hopes and connection with others.

recommendations.title: Benji the Hunted
recommendations.overview: Benji has become stranded on a remote island after a boating accident. He finds himself struggling to survive in the wilderness, avoiding close encounters with a wolf, a bear, and a territorial female cougar with her cub.

recommendations.title: The Speed Cubers
recommendations.overview: This documentary captures the extraordinary twists and turns in the journeys of Rubik's Cube-solving champions Max Park and Feliks Zemdegs.

recommendations.title: IF
recommendations.overview: After discovering she can see everyone's imaginary friends, a girl embarks on a magical adventure to reconnect forgotten imaginary friends with their kids.

recommendations.title: Lost in La Mancha
recommendations.overview: Fulton and Pepe's 2000 documentary captures Terry Gilliam's attempt to get The Man Who Killed Don Quixote off the ground. Back injuries, freakish storms, and more zoom in to sabotage the project.

recommendations.title: The Hollars
recommendations.overview: Aspiring New York City artist John Hollar returns to his Middle America hometown on the eve of his mother’s brain surgery. Joined by his girlfriend Rebecca, eight months pregnant with their first child, John is forced to navigate the crazy world he l

recommendations.title: One Child Nation
recommendations.overview: Through interviews with both victims and instigators, Nanfu Wang, a first-time mother, breaks open decades of silence on a vast, unprecedented social experiment that shaped — and destroyed — countless lives in China.

recommendations.title: Demi Lovato: Simply Complicated
recommendations.overview: A personal and intimate look into Demi Lovato's life as not only a regular 25 year old, but also one of the biggest pop stars in the world.
